description:
Kling Avatar - digital human from a photo.

Provide a face image and an audio file for the avatar to speak.

image.description: Face image for the avatar. Single clear front-facing face, good lighting. Formats: jpg, jpeg, png. Max 10MB.
image.title: Image

audio.description: Audio file for the avatar to speak (mp3/wav/m4a/aac, max 5MB, 2-300s).
audio.title: Audio

prompt.description: Action/emotion prompt for the avatar. E.g. 'While talking, excitedly shaking head'. Max 2500 chars.
prompt.title: Prompt

mode.description: Quality mode. 'pro' for higher quality ($0.112/sec), 'std' for cheaper ($0.056/sec).

title: AppInput
